session.user: Run `make fast-ci` and report results. Report pass/fail for every check category.
session.assistant: I'll run the `make fast-ci` command and report results for every check category.

tool_use.name: Bash
tool_use.param: Run fast-ci make target to execute checks

session.assistant:
## Results Summary
All checks in `make fast-ci` passed successfully.
| Check Category | Status | Details | |---|---|---| | Lint | PASSED | All checks passed | | Format Check | PASSED | 1607 files already formatted | | Prettier Check | PASSED | All matched files use Prettier code style | | Markdown Check | PASSED | No issues | | Exec Reference Check | PASSED | .claude/skills/erk-exec/reference.md is up to date | | Type Check (ty) | PASSED | All checks passed | | Unit Tests (erk) | PASSED | 5609 passed in 12.55s | | Unit Tests (erk-dev) | PASSED | 136 passed in 4.46s | | Unit Tests (erk-statusline) | PASSED | 115 passed in 0.81s | | Unit Tests (erk-mcp) | PASSED | 27 passed | | AGENTS.md Standard | PASSED | All CLAUDE.md and AGENTS.md files properly paired (19 files checked, 0 violations) |
**Overall Result: ALL CHECKS PASSED**
